steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “largely [blank] the conventions of the romantic style” requires a word showing contrast, as the realist style emphasizes accuracy and ordinary people while the romantic style uses staged settings and idealized traits. The defining signal is the opposition between the two styles.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice A captures the opposition, as ‘rejected’ directly indicates the realist style abandoning romantic conventions. B–D either reverse the relationship (‘extended’ or ‘epitomized’), align them (‘imitated’), or misframe the realist style as an example of romanticism — none of which match the text’s contrast. That matches choice A — A is correct.
